current-state.shows: truncated-dir, branch, worktree, model, version, context-bar, cache, cost, rate-limits

change.name: Absolute path (tilde-contracted)
change.source: cwd from stdin JSON — no subprocess

change.name: Git status indicator
change.note: Cache keyed on cwd — invalidates on directory change

change.name: PR number
change.note: Only on non-main branches. Cache keyed on branch name. First statusline render after branch switch may be slow. gh pr view failure (no PR exists) caches empty string — no retry until TTL.

rendering.cancellation: in-flight script killed on new trigger

proposal.example-output:
alex@jadecli.com · Ghostty · Pro Max │ ~/jadecli-ecosystem/ghostty/repos/jadecli/platform-manager · feat/pm-37-bootstrap-onboarding#4 · ✓ · Opus 4.6 · v2.1.84 · ██░░░░░░░░ 15% 1M
alex@jadecli.com · Ghostty · Pro Max │ [I] · WORKTREE: security-fix (from main) · ~/tmp/worktree-abc · fix/pm-99-patch · ●2+3 · Sonnet 4.6 · v2.1.84 · ████░░░░░░ 42%
proposal.rollback: git show main:hooks/statusline/statusline-command.sh is the previous version. Or: git log --oneline ~/.claude/statusline-command.sh won't work (not tracked). Keep a backup: cp ~/.claude/statusline-command.sh ~/.claude/statusline-command.sh.bak
proposal.token-impact: ZERO — statusline is local UI, not injected into conversation context
proposal.agent-loop-impact: ZERO — no tool calls, no stdin/stdout interception
